label.title: MCP Server — Operation Access Control
label.description: Control which Jahia GraphQL operations the MCP server is allowed to execute. Restrictions apply to all operation types (queries and mutations) sharing the same field name. Introspection fields (__schema, __type) always pass regardless of configuration.
label.allowListHint: Only checked operations are allowed through the MCP server.
label.allowListEmpty: No restrictions — all operations are allowed.
label.blockListHint: Checked operations are always blocked, regardless of the allow list.
label.saveError: An error occurred while saving the settings.
